scripts.build: tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/client/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/client/tsconfig.json --noEmit
